column2: 5pc Metal Detecting Tools Kit with Drawstring Backpack (3 Colors)
column3:
Whether you’re already a metal detecting enthusiast or just beginning this new hobby, the ASR Outdoor 5pc treasure hunting kit comes with everything you’ll need to quickly dig through silt, sand, and dirt for precious metals and gems. Inside the kit, you’ll find a trowel, a sand scoop with sifting holes, a beach digger scoop with a built-in coin probe, and a drawstring backpack to hold all of the kit items.

The hand trowel is constructed of lightweight and durable plastic and features a 4-inch measuring scale to control the depth of digging. It also features a rubberized thumb grip for added comfort and a convenient hang hole on the handle for easy storage when not in use.

We’ve also included a 9” length sand scoop featuring a 6” wide mouth for removing sand and rocks while digging for treasure. Each scoop has 78 holes and is made of single-construction durable plastic to ensure a long life. This material is especially useful during metal detection because it will not give false positive readings under a metal detector or pin pointer. 

Additionally, we’ve added a large sand scoop with an ergonomic handle that also doubles as a coin probe so you can more easily locate metals while digging in dirt, sand, and soft-pack gravel areas. All of these items fit inside a durable polyester drawstring backpack so you can travel with them easily. The bag features reinforced corners and measures 17” x 12.5”. This kit is a great gift idea for yourself or other metal-detecting enthusiasts and treasure hunters!

  • 5PC METAL DETECTING TOOLS BUNDLE: ASR Outdoor metal detecting kit comes with 5 treasuring hunting essentials: a trowel shovel, a sand scoop with sifting holes, a beach digger scoop with matching coin probe; All kit pieces fit inside included drawstring backpack for easy travel
  • 11 INCH HAND TROWEL: Hand trowel is made of durable, lightweight plastic featuring a 4 inch measuring scale to control depth of digging; Comes with rubberized thumb grip for added comfort and ease of use; Hang up hole on handle for easy storage when not in use
  • METAL DETECTING SAND SCOOP: 9" length sand scoop features 6" wide mouth for easily removing rocks and sand while digging for treasure; 78 holes per scoop assists with removing silt from river beds; Made of single construction durable plastic that will not give false positive readings under a metal detector
  • SAND SCOOP DIGGER WITH COIN PROBE: Accessories kit also comes with large sand scoop with an ergonomic handle; Handle also doubles as a coin probe for locating precious metals and gems while beach digging and treasure hunting
  • DRAWSTRING BACKPACK: Durable polyester travel backpack features strong grommets for security strings and stopper for keeping contents safely in the bag during travel; Measures 17" x 12.5" and comes with reinforced corners

column2: Mosquito Net with Mounting Kit Travel Camping Essentials Outdoor Canopy, 94.5 Inches
column3:
Ensure a restful night’s sleep with ASR Outdoors fine mesh round mosquito net for camping, travel, backpacking and other outdoor activities! Keep mosquitoes and pesky bugs out of your sleeping area with this large mosquito indoor or outdoor canopy; measuring 131 inches in diameter, the mosquito net is suitable for most size beds and mattresses. 

Importantly, this fine mesh mosquito net in sheer white colorway features 240 holes per square inch, meaning mosquitoes and bugs are out, but that airflow and circulation can still travel within the mosquito netting. The fine mesh material is made from durable polyester, holding up to lots of wear and tear on your travels, backcountry adventures, road trips and more.

A must have item to include with you for travels abroad where mosquitoes could pass on infection, this lightweight mosquito canopy design means the mosquito netting is easy to pack and carry with luggage, backpacking gear, camping gear, emergency preparedness items, survival kits and more. Plus, the mosquito net for bed comes with a mounting kit (hand tools not include), that includes the following: includes x1 hook, x1 wall anchor, x1pc 39 inch white cord, x1pc 24 inch upper hoop and x1 hanging loop.

Lastly, the mosquito net also comes with a reusable and resealable plastic storage zip lock bag for storage when not in use. Stay bug free and enjoy a peaceful, uninterrupted sleep with this camping essentials backpacking gear mosquito net from ASR Outdoor.

Dimensions: 94.5 x 131.5 inches

column2: 5 Gallon Collapsible Water Container Portable Camping & Emergency Water Storage
column3:
Stay prepared and hydrated during outdoor adventures with the ASR Outdoor Collapsible Water Container. Designed for convenience and portability, this flexible water carrier provides a reliable way to store and transport water while taking up minimal space in your gear. Whether you're setting up camp, preparing for emergencies, or storing water for travel, this collapsible container offers a practical solution for outdoor hydration.

With the ability to hold up to 5 gallons (20 liters) of water, this container expands when filled and collapses flat when empty, making it easy to store in backpacks, vehicles, emergency kits, or camping gear bins. The semi-transparent material allows you to quickly check water levels so you always know how much water remains.

Constructed from durable, flexible materials, the container is built to handle outdoor use while remaining lightweight and easy to carry. The integrated handle allows for convenient lifting and transport, while the wide opening and spigot-style valve make it simple to dispense water for drinking, cooking, or washing around camp.

When your adventure is over, simply empty the container and fold it down flat for compact storage. This space-saving design makes it ideal for camping trips, road travel, RV use, emergency preparedness kits, and everyday outdoor activities.

Lightweight, practical, and easy to pack, the ASR Outdoor Collapsible Water Container is an essential piece of gear for anyone who spends time outdoors or wants to be prepared with reliable water storage.

  • Large 5-gallon (20 liter) capacity for reliable water storage
  • Collapsible design folds flat for compact storage when empty
  • Semi-transparent material allows easy monitoring of water levels
  • Integrated handle for comfortable carrying and transport
  • Spigot valve for convenient water dispensing

column2: Reusable Thermal Mylar Emergency Blanket Sleeping Bag Bivvy Sack 40um Thickness
column3:
Torrential rain, hail, snowstorm or extreme wind, never be caught in the cold without a thermal emergency blanket sleeping bag! Also referred to as a bivvy sack, the ASR Outdoor thermal emergency blanket sleeping bag was engineered to retain body heat and provide protection, warmth and dryness when you’re up against the elements, making it an absolute must-have, essential item in your survival kit, emergency kit or bug out bag. Here are some important product specs to note on the mylar emergency blanket sleeping bag:

- Heavy-duty aluminized polyethylene Mylar material (tear/weather resistant)
- Bright orange exterior color increases visibility to emergency rescuers 
- Reflective interior reflects and retains 95% of generated body heat
- Designed for one single adult (36 inches by 84 inches)
- Extra-thick 40um thickness for prolonged warmth
- Weighs just 5 ounces

The most exceptional and noteworthy quality of the ASR Outdoor reusable thermal Mylar sleeping bag is it’s extra thickness. At 40um’s, it’s almost double the thickness of most competitors, allowing it to prolong warmth, dryness to help your body maintain a normal body temperature. In addition, the emergency blanket sleeping bag will reflect back and retain 95% of your body heat, helping to regulate the circulatory system and to assist in preventing the body from entering a state of shock or hypothermia when caught in extreme weather conditions. 

The ASR Outdoor bivvy sac will keep you warm because of it’s material construction; Made from heavy-duty aluminized polyethylene (PE) Mylar, the emergency blanket sleeping bag is extremely durable and weather-resistant, tear and puncture resistant, waterproof and windproof to be exact. Due to its durability, the sleeping bag can be used for a variety of purposes such as: a reflective warmer, as a rain or wind shield, as ground cover when camping, as a tarp to protect equipment, as an temporary emergency relief shelter (especially if you have a few to spare), as a flag or marker, extra sleeping layer if very cold conditions and more! Notably, the emergency blanket sleeping bag is completely reusable, so be sure to pack it with you when you and your family or friends are packing for the next outdoor adventure or expedition!

The ASR Outdoor Reusable Thermal Mylar Emergency Blanket Sleeping Bag is compact, lightweight and minimal in its design. Weighing just 5 ounces, the emergency blanket sleeping bag while designed to comfortably fit one single adult, rolls up to measure just six by six by three inches, making it easy to store, pack and travel with; a reusable drawstring storage travel bag is also included so you can neatly store it away when not in use. 

As mentioned above, the emergency blanket sleeping bag bivvy sac is an essential item for your survival kit, or bug out bag. If you don’t already stock these in your arsenal of camping, car, survival, trekking, backpacking, emergency or expedition kits or packs, we highly suggest you add a couple as a safety precaution. Quality material construction, compact design, extra thickness, weather resistant, puncture resistant and lightweight, the reusable sleeping bag is above all else, a potential lifesaver for you, your friends and your family when hit with unexpected extreme weather conditions—be prepared with the ASR Outdoor Reusable Thermal Mylar Emergency Blanket Sleeping Bag and stay warm when the weather won’t!

Whether you're documenting a hiking route, recording field notes, planning a camping trip, or keeping an emergency log, the ASR Outdoor Waterproof Notebook is built to handle the elements. Lightweight, durable, and easy to carry, it's a dependable addition to any camping gear kit, hiking pack, emergency preparedness bag, or everyday carry setup.

column2: Mini Stick On LED Lights 6 Pack Battery Operated Puck Lights with Magnet and Adhesive for Camping Gear RV Tool Boxes
column3:
Add quick, convenient lighting wherever you need it with the ASR Outdoor Mini Stick-On LED Lights, a compact and versatile lighting solution for camping gear, RV storage, tool boxes, tackle boxes, closets, vehicles, and outdoor equipment. Each pack includes six battery-operated LED puck lights, designed to provide bright, reliable illumination in tight or dark spaces where traditional lighting isn’t practical.

Powered by energy-efficient SMD LED technology, each light produces 50 lumens of bright white light, making them perfect for lighting up small compartments, storage bins, and gear bags. These push-on LED lights are simple to operate—just press the center to turn the light on or off for instant illumination whenever you need it.

Each light runs on long-lasting CR2032 batteries (included), providing dependable lighting without the need for wiring or charging. Whether you're organizing gear in your garage, setting up lighting inside your RV, or adding visibility to a toolbox or tackle box, these battery-powered LED lights offer a quick and easy lighting solution.

Designed for flexibility, each light features a magnetic base that securely attaches to metal surfaces such as tool boxes, vehicles, and equipment cases. The included adhesive backing allows the lights to be mounted on non-metal surfaces like cabinets, walls, storage containers, or camping bins. This gold pan is great for practicing panning techniques, as well as extraction and recovery, as the specifically designed bottom micro riffles will capture small gold nuggets or flakes with ease. Suitable for new hobbyists or experienced gold prospectors looking to try out a new tool. Good luck!

column2: First Aid Kit in Plastic Waterproof Case Survival Gear Emergency Preparedness Item, 50pc
column3:
Have you ever found yourself in a situation where you needed emergency supplies but didn't have any on hand? These situations can range in urgency from a child needing a bandage for a small cut or scrape to helping someone who is badly hurt and there are no available first responders. Time is critical when someone is injured, and even small injuries can become big injuries without immediate assistance. To address this, we've put together the ASR Outdoor 50 Piece First Aid Kit containing supplies to help you treat minor injuries and wounds, which will provide some peace of mind and ensure you have the ability to respond quickly until medical professionals can arrive.

Inside of the first response kit, you'll find supplies for cleaning and protecting wounds to assist in your first response efforts. The cleaning supplies included are 2 alcohol wipes, 2 sting relief wipes, and 2 antiseptic cleaning wipes. To protect the wound once it's been thoroughly cleaned, we've also included 10 cotton swabs, 10 large adhesive bandages (72mm x 19mm), 10 medium bandages (56mm x 19mm), 10 small bandages (40mm x 10mm), and 2 gauze pads. These different sized bandages along with the additional supplies should be able to address the most common minor injuries such as a cut, scrape, burn or blister.

In addition to all of these first aid supplies, we've included a bright red waterproof plastic container that will protect the supplies in the event that the case becomes submerged or affected by inclement weather. The high-visibility red color will help you locate the kit in poor lighting conditions like in the trunk of a car or if an emergency happens at night. The entire kit measures just 4.25" x 4" x 1.25" and weighs only .2 pounds (3.2 ounces), making it a great size for keeping in your car, boat, bug out bag, camping gear or backpack while traveling. The case also comes with a carabiner and lanyard so you can hang it from your belt or bag. 

There are many reasons to keep a first aid kit nearby, including liability for businesses and employees. When an injury occurs, a first aid kit can save lives and keep you prepared for an accident, which we all know are unexpected. No one wants to think about being sued, and businesses by law are required to keep first aid supplies readily available when there is no first response within 10 minutes. Protect yourself, your family, your business, your employees and strangers with a durable, waterproof, fully stocked first aid kit! We hope you never need it, but in the event that you do, you will be prepared.

column3:
Non-Metallic Covert Zirconia Ceramic Razor Blade was designed as a low profile survival knife that has been adopted for every day carry as it is easily carried without any added bulk. There have been many versions of this ceramic razor blade over time but this latest version, the CRB is to date the one you want. It is constructed from zirconia ceramic, which is very sharp, wear resistant and non-dulling; this non-metallic knife will continue to stay sharp and cut well with continued use. It has a lifespan that is greatly increased over older versions due to advances in ceramic materials technologies.

The main cutting surface of the razor blade features a chisel-grind edge that gives you a much more acute angle than a double-sided grind. It will cut better and hold its edge longer, which is what you want a blade to do when it comes to various cutting tasks.

A built in mini lanyard hole provides a means for this micro blade to be sewn into clothing, attached to your belt or outdoor gear, using natural Kevlar thread. In total, this non metal knife is smaller than a American quarter and can prove to be life saving when needed in emergency survival situations. Widely used as a component to EDC tactical gear and SERE kits this ceramic razor blade is a must.

column2: Full Magnesium Body Fire Starter Survival Tool with Striker
column3:
Whether you're deep in the backcountry, prepping for emergencies, or teaching essential outdoor skills, the ASR Outdoor Magnesium Fire Starter is your go to tool for instant flame and reliable heat! Set includes striker and magnesium fire starter on keychain.

Compact and powerful, this pocket sized fire starter packs serious survival punch. Just shave off some magnesium onto dry tinder, strike the ferro rod with the included scraper, and voila! A burst of hot sparks ignites your fire in seconds, even in damp or windy conditions.

Perfect for campers, hikers, backpackers, preppers, and anyone who loves the outdoors, this fire starter is a smart, lightweight addition to your survival kit or bug out bag.

No matches? No problem. Wet wood? Still lights. Cold night? You’re covered.

Don’t get caught without a flame--grab the fire starting tool that sparks when it counts!

How to Use:

  1. Gather tinder of preferred size/amount.

  2. Use the serrated edge of the striker to scrape along the magnesium rod to create shavings.

  3. Sprinkle magnesium shavings throughout the tinder pile or create a cluster to the size of a U.S. quarter coin.

  4. Hold the flint at an angle over the pile, sliding the striker forcefully along the length of the flint to create sparks.

  5. Continue sliding the striker against the flint until sparks land directly onto the shavings pile and ignite a flame.

  6. Note: Strip the protective layer of paint from the striker before first-time use for best results.

column3:
ASR Outdoor 550 Survival Paracord Duty Belt: Your Wearable Emergency Tool

Always be ready for the unexpected with the ASR Outdoor 550 Survival Paracord Duty Belt. This isn't just a belt; it's a vital piece of everyday survival gear that keeps over 100 feet of durable paracord wrapped conveniently around your waist. Perfect for essential preparedness and tactical applications, you'll have the resources to improvise in any outdoor emergency.

Why the ASR Outdoor Paracord Belt is Essential Gear

This innovative survival belt provides quick access to a versatile tool for countless situations:

Always Prepared: By wearing your paracord, you eliminate the need to search through your pack in an emergency. It's always on hand when you need to rig a tent, start a fire, set snares, fish, or repair gear.

Tactical & Practical: Whether you're in the wilderness or facing an unexpected situation, this belt offers immediate access to a strong, reliable rope. Use the unraveled paracord for tasks like:

    • Creating an emergency sling to navigate difficult terrain.

    • Constructed from Mil-Spec 550 Tactical Paracord, the same high-quality material used by the US Military.
    • Features 7 strands of 100% genuine Mil-Spec 550lb parachute cord.
    • Boasts a breaking strength of 550 lbs with a reliable working load of 220 lbs.

Comfortable Universal Fit:

    • Designed for a universal fit with high adjustability.
    • Features a durable stainless steel belt buckle.
    • No pre-made belt holes mean you can secure the belt clasp through the paracord weave at any desired interval for a perfectly comfortable and secure fit.

Beef Up Your Bug Out Bag & Daily Wear

The ASR Outdoor black paracord belt is an essential addition to your bug out bag and an ideal piece of daily wear gear. Stay prepared, stay safe, and be ready for any adventure with this indispensable survival tool.

column2: 9 Inch 440 Stainless Steel Recurve Full Tang Fixed Blade Knife with Sheath (4.25 Inch Blade)
column3:
The nine inch Fixed Recurve Blade Full Tang Hunting Knife with wood handle from ASR Outdoor is engineered for precision and versatility in the field. For chopping, slashing, peeling and other base to point cutting tasks, this knife can do it all.
If you’re not familiar with a recurve blade, it means that the knife blade itself is shaped like the letter ‘S’ with a concave edge. The fixed recurve blade lengthens the cutting edge without making the blade longer; it places the edge at multiples to the work being done, allowing it to easily handle different cutting angles.

Why choose this style of knife? The design of the knife allows you to move mass out to the tip of your blade by adding width, instead of thickness, preserving cutting ability and adding chopping power at the same time. 

The full tang 440 stainless steel construction ensures that the blades weight is more evenly distributed throughout the knife, making it easier to control; full tang blade ensures structural integrity and strength when handling, one you’ll be able to notice in comparison to a partial tang. And, importantly, the 440 stainless steel material boasts excellent edge retention and corrosion resistance, while the wood handle ensures a natural and comfortable grip, offering reliable feedback during cutting task.

The included sheath with a belt loop offers convenient and safe carrying, ensuring your knife is always within reach when you need it. Whether you’re hunting, camping, or exploring the wilderness, this hunting knife with fixed recurve blade is built to handle it all with confidence and precision.

column2: Micro EDC Ceramic Striker Survival Gear Fire Starter (2 Colors)
column3:
Create a fire in a pinch with the ASR Outdoor Ceramic Ferro Rod Micro Striker. This tiny fire starter survival tool is easy to carry and possibly the simplest, wearable edc gear that has a useful intended purpose while being completely out of the way when fashioned into a zipper pull or fire starter necklace using 550 paracord.

Easily start a camp fire with one good scratch from this ceramic fire striker by creating sparks against a ferro rod or magnesium. Unlike traditional fire steel that can corrode with oxidation or rust if it gets wet and not cared for. This lightweight emergency fire starter is made from extremely hard zirconia ceramic material that will continuously create sparks without absorbing heat; it will not dull, wear out or rust. It will produce a shower of super-hot sparks capable of igniting almost any tinder in most all conditions, wet, damp or dry.

Weighing next to nothing and taking up very little room in your hiking backpack proves the ASR Outdoor fire striker is a must have camping survival tool for your wilderness survival kit creating endless sparks from ferrocerium or for shaving and scraping magnesium. Effective fire starting must start with a spark and this is a top priority while prepping for emergency survival.

  • EMERGENCY FIRE STARTER - Designed to never fail you when you must build a fire to survival, this ferro rod and magnesium scraper can be used thousands of times
  • LIGHTWEIGHT SURVIVAL EDC - Built from Zirconia Ceramic this emergency fire starter striker is super hard (Like Diamond); will never dull, rust or wear out
  • CAMPING GEAR ACCESSORY - Fashion on 550 paracord as a zipper pull, fire starter necklace, or key ring for easy access
  • EMERGENCY SURVIVAL KIT - Pair together with a ferro rod and magnesium to create a lightweight EDC camping survival kit
  • Will not absorb heat created from sparks; continuously scrape out hot sparks until you get your fire started

column3:
Be prepared wherever your adventure takes you with the ASR Outdoor 3-in-1 Waterproof Match Container—a compact, multi-function survival tool designed to keep your essentials dry, accessible, and ready when you need them most.

Built for the outdoors, this durable waterproof container safely stores matches and small survival items, protecting them from moisture, rain, and harsh conditions. Whether you're deep in the backcountry or preparing for emergencies, this pocket-sized tool delivers reliable performance in a lightweight design.

More than just storage, this versatile container features a built-in signaling mirror in the lid for emergency visibility and communication, along with a firestarter flint integrated into the base—giving you multiple survival tools in one compact unit.

From camping trips to emergency kits, this is a must-have addition for anyone who values preparedness and simplicity in the outdoors.

  • 3-in-1 Survival Tool: Waterproof storage, signal mirror, and firestarter flint all in one compact design
  • Waterproof Storage Compartment: Keeps matches, tinder, and small essentials dry and protected in wet conditions
  • Integrated Signal Mirror: Reflective lid helps attract attention or signal for help in emergency situations
  • Built-In Firestarter Flint: Reliable spark source for starting fires in the field for warmth, cooking, or signaling
  • Compact & Lightweight: Pocket-sized design makes it easy to carry in backpacks, kits, or everyday gear

column2: Heavy Duty Galvanized Carbon Steel Tent Stakes 11 Inch - Camping Ground Anchors for Tents Tarps Canopies (3 Colors, Assorted Pack Sizes)
column3:
Secure your shelter with confidence using our Heavy Duty Camping Tent Stakes, built for durability, easy setup and reliable performance across a wide range of outdoor environments. Whether you're setting up camp deep in the backcountry or anchoring a canopy for a weekend outing, these rugged ground stakes are designed to hold strong when it matters most.

Constructed from a durable, single body design, these tent stakes deliver dependable ground anchoring, while remaining lightweight enough for backpacking and travel. The pointed tip allows for easy penetration into dirt, sand, gravel, or grass, while the reinforced top stopper and integrated eyelet make setup and removal quick and efficient. These tent pegs are constructed from durable and long lasting galvanized steel, meaning a protective zinc coating is placed over top of the steel in order to prevent rusting or corrosion. 

Designed with versatility in mind, these multipurpose stakes are ideal for securing camping tents, tarps, rain flies, canopies, and even landscaping or outdoor event setups. Their high-visibility color helps you quickly locate your gear in low light conditions, reducing the chance of lost or forgotten stakes at your campsite.

NOTE: Orange is the only style with twisted metal body design. Green and Glow in the Dark styles features a straight metal body design.

  • Reliable Ground Hold – Designed for strong anchoring in dirt, sand, gravel, and grassy terrain
  • Lightweight & Packable – Ideal for camping, backpacking, hiking, and travel
  • Durable One-Piece Construction – Built for repeated outdoor use without bending or breaking
  • Quick Setup Design – Pointed tip and top stopper with eyelet for fast installation and removal
  • High Visibility Color – Easy to spot in your gear or low-light conditions (orange or glow in the dark options)

column2: Classifier Screen with 10L Collapsible Silicone Bucket Gold Prospecting Equipment
column3:
Whether you're new to gold panning or are an experienced gold prospector, you know how important it is to be able to successfully and efficiently classify your raw material down to usable paydirt, either for panning or to run through a sluice box to find gold nuggets, gems or other. The ASR Outdoor collapsible bucket, collapsible stand and 1/4 inch classifier screen does just this in just a few easy steps!

The ASR Outdoor collapsible bucket has been designed to work seamlessly with the included 1/4 inch ASR Outdoor sifting pan; together they make a an efficient classification system that is easy to set up and take down, lightweight and reliable. The collapsible bucket is a lightweight alternative to a traditional 5 gallon bucket, which can be heavy and cumbersome to use, as well as carry to and from your gold claim site. To use the bucket and stand combo, you simply slide the four arms into the base and rotate until they lock in place. Then place the collapsible bucket over the tops of the arms and secure. Next, add your sifter and you're ready to start classifying your raw material.

The 1/4 inch classifier screen we've included in this gold panning kit is made from high impact, durable ABS plastic and will stand up to lots of gold prospecting equipment wear and tear. This sifting screens will allow you to classify down material to usable paydirt, removing larger unwanted materials like rocks and gravels, leaving you with just sand, fine gravels and hopefully gold nuggets! And, as mentioned, the sifters are designed to be stacked on top of the collapsible bucket for quick and efficient processing of unclassified paydirt.

The collapsible bucket is made from BPA free silicone, features a sturdy carrying handle, bottom finger indentation and water pouring channel; the bucket can also be employed for tons of other uses outside of gold panning kits like fishing, gardening, as an ice bucket, for camping and much more. Lastly, a handy mesh bag is included to make carrying the collapsible bucket and stand components easier, while allowing for tidy and organized storage when you're not utilizing your gold prospecting equipment to ensure none of the pieces are lost (does not fit the 1/4 inch classifier screen).

The collapsible bucket with stand is space saving, compact and lightweight in design, and overall a useful and versatile tool to include with your gold prospecting equipment.

column2: 11 Inch Pin Pointer Metal Detecting Hand Trowel Shovel with Depth Markers (2 Colors)
column3:
The ASR Outdoor Metal Detector Hand Trowel is a reliable hand tool that is crafted from high abrasive ABS plastic, which makes it not only strong and durable, but also lightweight and easy to use. The main benefit of using a non metal hand trowel is that you can use a pin pointer metal detector on the dirt that is still in the shovel without getting false positive readings.

The ideal use for this is for when metal detecting in the field to get scoops out of a dug hole and then swept with a pin pointer to determine if the object that the metal detector sounded off for is in the trowel. You can't do this with a metal trowel!

Each trowel features a 4 inch measuring scale on the scoop so you can control the depth of your digging. This hand trowel is extremely versatile and can be used in multiple types of terrain.

  • NO FALSE POSITIVES: Constructed from ABS plastic composite you can use a pin pointer metal detector on the dirt that is still in the shovel without getting false positive readings
  • DEPTH MARKER: Specially designed depth ruler is embossed into the face of the shovel pan; this will not wear off with normal use and will help control metered digging
  • DURABILITY AND LONGEVITY: Made to stand up to daily use this handheld digging tool will do the job consistently well and will be a reliable asset to keep with your metal detecting tools and accessories
  • COMFORT AND EASE: The metal detector hand trowel features an ergonomic handle with rubber thumb grip that aides in the daily use of this tool

Whether you’re searching for small bits of history or cash value items like gold coins, jewelry or precious metals, set yourself up for success in the field with ASR Outdoors 18pc Metal Detector Accessories Kit.

The kit includes the following metal detector accessories:

x1 Musette style shoulder bag; x1 3 in 1 shovel with pick; x1 pair of gloves; x1 depth marker trowel; x1 10X eye loupe; x1 carabiner clip; x6 resealable plastic zip lock bags; x1 waterproof notebook; x1 serrated edge digger; x1 scoop with probe; x1 large sand scoop and x1 pair of tweezers

Featuring a large, main compartment for raw materials collection, there are a total of 13 interior pockets to keep tools organized; a specialty zipper opening tool flap pocket found on the front of the bag, allows for quick access to notepads, maps, pens and pencils, personal belongings and more. column2: ASR Outdoor and Pan for Gold with Bobby Bo Guaranteed Gold Paydirt Bags (3oz, 1LB, 3LB, 10LB)
column3:
ASR Outdoor X Bobby Bo paydirt bags are an excellent way to practice and enhance gold panning skills if you can't make it to an outdoor claim site. Available in a variety of classified and unclassified options, there's a paydirt bag here for every skill level, starting with a 3oz beginner classified bag, up to a large 10lb advanced unclassified bag.

  • 3OZ PAYDIRT BAG: Each bag will bare gold flakes and flower gold in the 20-30 mesh size range. The raw material is classified and contains no magnetic material like black sand, making it ideal for beginners new to the the sport.
  • 1LB PAYDIRT BAG: The one pound bag of beginner paydirt is pre-classified and includes lightweight materials like blond sands and fine gravels that are easy to pan; you won’t find any black sand or other heavy minerals here! This paydirt features coarse gold that will sit heavier in the pan, making it easier for those who might be new to the hobby to see and extract.
  • 3LB PAYDIRT BAG: Features unclassified paydirt filled with coarse gold flakes and fine flower gold. Black sand and other raw materials are present, which will require classification work. Great for honing in on classification work and fine gold recovery.
  • 10LB PAYDIRT BAG: Curated for the more experienced prospector, this paydirt features fine gold for a more difficult panning and extraction process, large gravels and significant amounts of black sand that will require classification work.

column3:
The newest addition to ASR Outdoors classifier collection are these large, six inch deep plastic stackable sifting screens with built in handle, ideal for working with and sifting out pay dirt or other valuable items from unwanted raw material. Importantly, these heavy duty plastic sifting screen is able to be stacked on top of a five gallon bucket, and are also compatible with all other sizes of ASR Outdoor stainless steel mesh classifiers.

Specifications To Note:

- Mesh Sizes: 1/2 inch, 1/4 inch or 1/8 inch
- Top Diameter: 13-1/4 inches 
- Bottom Diameter: 10 inches
- Depth: 6 inches; Space between sifters when stacked: 4"
- Durable Polypropylene Plastic Material

As mentioned, these heavy duty plastic gold rush sifting screens are ideal for working with coarse or more fine raw materials. Designed to be stacked on top of a five gallon bucket, use these plastic sifting screens or soil sifters to separate high value pay dirt from other unwanted organic material, like rocks, gravels, plant matter and aggregates.

Two important design features to note: depth and built in handles. The depth of this plastic sifting screen is intentional and will allow you to move through much more raw material in comparison to a more shallow classifier screen. Lastly, when carrying and working with heavier and large amounts of material, you'll appreciate the two built in side handles, making the plastic sifting screen easier to maneuver.

The ASR Outdoor heavy duty plastic sifting screens are made of tough and durable polypropylene plastic that will see you through many gold prospecting or rock hounding seasons to come. The high quality plastic material will never rust, making it a great classifier suitable for all types of weather. To maintain longevity, rinse and air dry between uses. The plastic classifier would also make a great gardening or foraging tool.

column2: 16pc Traditional Sluice Box Finishing Gold Panning Kit with Classifier Screens, Green
column3:
The ASR Outdoor Sluice Box Gold Prospecting Kit comes with everything you'll need to pan for gold anywhere, anytime!

The backbone of this kit is made up of a lightweight plastic sluice box with a versatile shoulder strap which allows you to easily take it to the beach, mountains or a river valley. With a shoulder strap that can be configured three different ways, seven pound box allows for maximum comfort and ease of transportation. The ASR Outdoor Gold Panning Gravity Trap 32-inch Portable Riffle Gold Sluice Box is a gravity fed high recovery gold prospecting and mineral collection tool. Extremely portable and weighing only 7lbs, made from high-impact durable plastic, it will never rust and can be used even in the harshest of climates without worry.

Molded into the channel of the ASR Outdoor Gold Panning Sluice Box is a set of riffle traps featuring four tested and true riffle designs to maximize the amount of gold that is separated from your pay dirt, they are; Hungarian, V-shape, Micro, and Square. These traditional and proven riffle patterns will help increase the amount of gold prospecting material you collect while separating your sediment and maximizing your efficiency.

The Gravity Trap Gold Sluice Box is 32 inches in length with a 10 inch wide channel and has 3 inch high channel walls to keep all your valuable, high yielding pay dirt confined and flowing over the riffle collection. The mouth of the Gold Prospecting Sluice Box features a 16 inch flared opening designed to increase the volume of water entering the prospecting channel thus increasing the flow rate through the Sluice Box. The Sluice Box is manufactured from green ABS High-Impact plastic allowing for maximum clarity and easy spotting or identifying of gold flakes, nuggets, gems, or your choice mineral.

The 32-inch Gravity Gold Rush Sluice Box by ASR Outdoor is the ideal set-up for beginner gold panning and experienced Miner Forty-Niners alike, as there is always a need for the proper tool for the job and this Gold Panning Sluice Box will find a good home with you in the wilderness when put to good use. To increase your gold collection efforts, use the ASR Outdoor Material Classifier Screens to sort your sediment before utilizing the Gravity Trap Riffled Sluice Box for gold prospecting.

To complement the sluice box, we've also included 2 classifier sifting screens that are designed to fit on top of standard 5 gallon buckets so you can sift out minerals with ease. You'll also find an magnetic separator pick up tool and a coin probe to help you locate and pick up metal objects as you find them.

In addition to the sluice box, we've included two 14" pans and one 10" diameter pan. The green color makes it easy to spot minerals among silt and dirt. We've also added in two pipette droppers, one 1 watt flashlights and three 2 dram glass vials for collecting your gems and minerals. We also included in a heavy duty scoop and a set of magnifying tweezers to help you identify and evaluate your findings. This is a great prospecting kit for beginners, intermediate and expert prospectors alike!

The 22pc Finishing Gold Panning Kit from ASR Outdoor is a curated set of gold prospecting equipment or prospecting tools that focuses on gold panning and recovery. While we've included a 1/8th classifier screen, this will only remove larger unwanted raw materials like rocks and large gravels, and may not provide enough classification of your raw mineral deposit into a "pan-able" collection of pay dirt. (Notably, our large sifting screens have been designed to sit on top of a five gallon bucket).

To help you start collecting your raw material deposit, we've included durable plastic trowels and a 32oz rock pick hammer, so that you can break up tough rocks and loosen the soil. There is also a 16lbs magnetic pick up tool, which helps to remove any magnetic material like black sand, making it easier and faster to pan for gold. (Note: it may take several uses to remove all magnetic material).

Once you have mostly classified pay dirt to work with, you'll want to turn to the single riffle and dual riffle gold pans for gold panning. The included gold pans in this kit are perfect for picking out the fine gold flakes and larger gold nuggets, as the saturated green colorway will make gold or other valuable materials stand out.

If you're lucky enough to find any gold flakes or gold nuggets, we've included 10 glass collection vials; these glass vials have screw on caps and will magnify your find with a bit of added water (5 large and 5 small). The two snifter bottles included will all you to pick up small nuggets from your pan, as well as to help clean found gold before storing it in the vial(s).

  • DUAL RIFFLE GOLD PANS: 3 different dual riffle gold pans (8”, 12” and 14” diameter) that are designed to fit with collapsible bucket; deep blue color that will assist with identifying gold nuggets and flakes

The ASR Outdoor 13pc Gold Panning Kit comes with everything you’ll need to pan for gold – a sifting classifier, gold pans, a sand scoop, a mini sluice box, glass vials, snifter bottles, and a magnetic pickup tool. All of the items fit neatly inside of a 30-liter capacity canvas backpack (color may vary) featuring reinforced stitching and sturdy zip and buckle closures.]

Included with the kit is a BPA Free silicone collapsible bucket designed to fit on a standard 5-gallon bucket. Incredibly versatile in nature, this bucket will work seamlessly with classifier sieves for gold panning, prospecting, and mining. It can also be used as a beverage cooler, small laundry basket, pet bowl, firewood carrier, gardening, or fishing bucket.

Each backpack kit comes with 3 different dual riffle gold pans (8”, 12”, and 14” diameter) that are designed to fit with the collapsible bucket. They come in a deep blue color that will assist with identifying gold nuggets and flakes while sifting through dirt, sand, and silt. We’ve also included a 1/2” classifier sieve that also fits with the collapsible bucket, great for sifting through coarser material.

Inside the backpack you’ll find a compact and portable mini sluice box that is just 12” in length, featuring high channel walls and V-shape ribbed rubber matting ideal for gold mining. Ready to use out of the kit, the mini sluice box requires no assembly so you can get to work right away.

Lastly, we’ve included a set of essential gold panning accessories that will help with separating, scooping, and storing gold – a 12” sand scoop, (2) 3oz snifter bottles, 2 glass collection vials, and a 5lb magnetic pickup tool that will distinguish gold flakes from black sand.

This kit was designed for beginner, intermediate, and expert gold prospectors, so you rest assured, you can enjoy gold panning whether you’re new to the hobby or a seasoned prospector. Good luck!

  • 12 INCH RUBBER SLUICE BOX: Sluice box features three gold riffle trap patterns: Hungarian, V-Shaped and Square, proven to efficiently trap gold; weighing in at just 0.46lbs, this rubber sluice box is easy to pack and carry with other gold prospecting equipment OR;
  • 12 INCH ALUMINUM SLUICE BOX: Mini aluminum sluice box features V Shaped ribbed rubber sluice box matting, proven to efficiently trap gold; And, weighing in at just 0.60lbs, this compact sluice box is easy to pack and carry with other gold prospecting equipment
  • CLASSIFIER SCREENS: Stack x3 mini sifting screens on top of gold pans to create a seamless material classification system, which removes unwanted material from your pay dirt concentrate, ideal for gold panning or feeding mini rubber sluice box
  • DRAWSTRING BACKPACK: This gold panning kit comes with a drawstring backpack to hold smaller prospecting tools, keeping them together and organized; drawstring backpack is incredibly lightweight, adding to the portability of this gold panning kit
  • PROSPECTING TOOLS: Gold panning kit also includes x4 snuffer bottles, x1 8lbs magnetic separator tool, x1 green prospectors scoop, x3 glass vials, x1 pair of magnifying tweezers and a 3 in 1 compact folding shovel


If you’re looking for a start to finish sluice box gold prospecting kit, look no further than the ASR Outdoor 20pc Complete Portable Sluice Box Gold Panning Kit. Intended for end to end raw material processing, this kit includes a comprehensive selection of prospecting tools needed for classification, collection and storage, and is incredibly portable!

And, while the mini 12 inch mini rubber sluice box, drawstring backpack and 3.5 gallon bucket make this kit easy to trek to and from a claim site, the supplementary components we’ve included ensure you’re never compromising on the range of prospecting tools or processes needed for a successful day in the field.

The compact 3 in 1 folding shovel and bucket make a great place to start gathering raw material. Once you’ve filled your bucket, transfer the raw material to stacked mini classifier screens that will sit on top of chosen included dual riffle green gold pans (10, 12 or 14 inch); You’ve now created an effective classification system to remove undesirable material like rocks and gravel from your pay dirt concentrate. However, before you start panning or sluicing, be sure grab that large 8lb magnetic separator tool! This will help to remove black sand and any other heavy magnetic materials, making it easier to separate and extract gold from your pay dirt.

Whether you choose to feed your mini rubber sluice or work on gold panning techniques, you’ve got both options with this kit! The 12 inch mini sluice box made from one piece of thermoplastic rubber features three gold riffle trap patterns: Hungarian, V-Shaped and Square, proven to efficiently trap gold. And, weighing in at just 0.46lbs, this rubber sluice box is easy to pack and carry with other gold prospecting equipment. Alternatively, the gold pans included are dual riffle with both a shallow and deep sidewall riffle design; they measure 10, 12 and 14 inches, are molded from one piece of high impact ABS plastic, are lightweight, rust and UV resistant, buoyant in water, and are suitable for all levels of gold prospectors.

If you’re lucky enough to spot gold, you can use the included snuffer bottles to extract gold flakes or nuggets and store them in the screw top glass vials for safe keeping. If not, well, we’re sorry to say, it’s back to the bucket. Good luck out there!

column2: Large Rubber Riffled Sluice Box Matting for Gold Recovery, 27 x 10 inch
column3:
• FLEXIBLE RUBBER SLUICE MAT: Once your material is run through the mat it can easily be rolled up letting you rinse out the concentrate that you have trapped; Made from TPR rubber that will not stiffen in cold weather

  • 3 RIFFLE TRAP PATTERNS: There are 3 different pattern gold collection riffle traps allow for various sizes of gold material to be trapped while each serving a different purpose to help aid in the gold prospecting recovery process

  • HUNGARIAN: Increases the turbulence behind the riffle, which agitates the sand bed, improving gold deposits; V-SHAPE: these groves work very well for catching fine gold flake; SQUARE RIFFLE: The large groves allow for catching small finds, pickers, and small gold nuggets

  • CUT TO FIT: The sluice box matting is pre-scored so it can easily be cut down to only 8 inches wide using the guide line on the back of the matting. Overall dimensions of the matting are 10 inches wide by 27 inches in length

  • MAXIMIZE RECOVERY EFFORTS: This is the perfect mat for superb fine gold recovery with fast or slow water and will enhance your gold prospecting and recovery efforts


The ASR Outdoor Rubber Riffle Sluice Box Mat is made from highly durable, one-piece flexible rubber that will never harden or crack in cold weather and is designed with 3 traditional, tried and true fine gold collecting riffle patterns. These gold recovery riffle traps are designed to maximize the amount of gold nuggets and gold flake that is trapped when separated from your raw screened material.

This Rubber Riffled Sluice Box Matting is manufactured from green thermoplastic rubber (TPR) allowing for optimal clarity and easy spotting and identifying of gold flake, gold nuggets, gems, or your choice rock hounding mineral. It is also a Trimmable Riffle Sluice Box Matting which is pre-scored so it can easily be cut down to only 8 inches wide using the guide line on the back of the matting. Overall dimensions of the matting are 10 inches wide by 27 inches in length; with riffle traps running the entire length.

This is the perfect sluice box mat for superb fine gold recovery with fast or slow water which will enhance your gold prospecting and recovery efforts.

The different pattern gold collection riffle traps allow for various sizes of material to be trapped while each serving a different purpose to help aid in the gold prospecting recovery process;  they are; Hungarian, V-shape, and Square riffle patterns;

Hungarian Riffle Trap:

Increases the turbulence behind the riffle, which agitates the sand bed, improving gold deposits within the recovery traps
V Shape Riffle Trap: V-shaped groves work very well for catching fine gold


Square Riffle Trap: The large groves allow for catching small finds, pickers, and small nuggets

Once your gold pay dirt material is run through the mat it can easily be rolled up to let you rinse out the concentrate that you have trapped. The concentrate rinsed from the matting will contain most of the gold accumulated during the run and is now ready to be panned and separated.

These traditional and proven riffle patterns will help increase the amount of gold and minerals you recover. Always sift or screen your material first using the ASR Outdoor Classifier Sifter Screens to ensure that your gold prospecting material that is run through your sluice box matting is finely separated from your raw material, maximizing your efficiency in the field.

column3:

  • POCKET SLUICE BOX - Measures just 12" in length, 3" wide and 5.5"  at the flare mouth; Easily fits in pocket, backpack or travel bag to accommodate any use

  • EASY TO USE - Sluice box has 3 repeating gold riffle trap patterns: Hungarian, "V" Shaped and Square; Proven to efficiently trap gold and precious minerals while sifting away unwanted material

  • DURABLE LIGHTWEIGHT DESIGN - Made from high contrast TPR rubber known for being flexible and UV resistant; easy to use in inclement weather; will not crack or break

  • GOLD PROSPECTING EQUIPMENT - Pocket sluice boxes are great for kids and beginners; valuable addition to seasoned gold prospectors and experts; scout new locations before hauling larger equipment


Whether you're an avid gold prospector or just dipping your toes into this fun outdoor hobby, gold panning with a pocket sluice box will help ensure you have the best prospecting experience. Our unique pocket size mini sluice box measures just 12" in length, has a 3" wide body and a 5.5" wide mouth, so you can quite literally fit this into a large pocket if needed, or use the carabiner hole to hang from your rucksack.

Made from high quality TPR (Thermoplastic Rubber) rubber this sluice box will continuously provide high yielding results of fine gold from your pay dirt. Known for being lightweight, flexible and UV resistant, this high-contrast green rubber material is ideal for a pocket sluice because it is easy to clean up and clear out once your gold pay dirt is washed through and it can travel easily without sacrificing space.

The ASR Outdoor gold panning pocket sluice box features three traditional riffle patterns proven to trap gold flake and nuggets: Hungarian, "V" shape and Square riffle gold traps that are built-in to create water turbulence in the sediment channel. They will trap the gold in your pay dirt and separate the small gold flour in a very effective way that helps to increase your gold prospecting recovery efforts. Coarse pieces will be caught easily in the Hungarian riffle traps while other smaller gold pieces may float over and get caught in the V shape before it has a chance to run out of your sluice box. Using a hybrid sluice design like this one gives you the best chance to maximize your gold recovery for various types of different gold.

The ASR Outdoor pocket sluice box for gold panning is a great addition to any seasoned prospector's collection of gold mining equipment as well as a great first-time sluice box option for beginners in their gold panning kits as this small unit takes the guess work out of panning and puts results in your hand. This compact and versatile pocket sluice box takes on the design extensively used during the California gold rush, sluice boxes were developed to have different riffle patterns that work together to sift out raw material while trapping gold flake and small gold flour in. Using a sluice box to pan for gold will allow you to easily identify valuable minerals while disposing of unwanted materials like silt, rock, and sand.

Scout and explore new locations before hauling all of your larger gold prospecting equipment out to the field. Use this pocket sluice box to run test concentrate and pay dirt from your site. The ASR Outdoor Pocket Sluice box is a must-have gold panning tool for any gold rush prospector!

column2: Dual Riffle Gold Pans Gold Prospecting Equipment (3 Colors and Sizes)
column3:
• DUAL RIFFLE GOLD PAN: Gold Pan incorporates both deep and shallow riffle side wall, allowing better separation of gold from other heavy minerals

  • HIGH QUALITY FABRICATION: Molded from one piece high impact ABS plastic, this gold pan is light weight, rust-free, UV resistant and floats

  • MAXIMUM GOLD RECOVERY: Dual riffle gold pan technology allows for all sizes of alluvial gold particles to be efficiently collected without missing any fine specs

  • PAY DIRT GOLD NUGGETS: Large riffles trap the gold much like the riffles in a sluice box, leading to a faster panning process letting you process more pay dirt

  • BEFORE USE: Gold pan should be seasoned before use


Trap gold while gold prospecting with the ASR Outdoor Dual Riffle Gold Pan for Gold Prospecting Gravity Trap.

This lightweight but super tough pan is a top quality gold-getter and will hold up to years of gold prospecting!

Featuring two riffle types cut into the sidewalls of the pan helping to catch more fine gold and taking the hard work out of the panning process. These deep and shallow riffles make it possible to run more gold paydirt and gold rich concentrate effectively through the prospecting gold pan.

This high-impact plastic gold pan is lightweight, easy to use and the most efficient gold panning tool to use today over traditional steel gold pans. It is molded from durable ABS plastic that is UV resistant, rust-proof, and available in multiple sizes.

Use the deep riffles to rough out the raw material, finishing with the shallow riffles to make short work of your final heavy gold concentrates.

A great gold panning kit for any level of gold prospector looking to advance or keep their gold panning skills and techniques sharp.

column2: 7pc Kids Starter Gold Panning Kit Beginner Prospecting Equipment with Paydirt (3 Colors)
column3:
• 7PC KIDS GOLD PANNING KIT: ASR Outdoor beginner’s gold prospecting kit comes with everything kids or beginners need to practice gold panning; plastic scoop, 6 inch classifier, collection vial, snifter bottle, 10X magnifier, 8 inch dual riffle gold pan and 3oz bag of paydirt
  • BOBBY BO GOLD PAY DIRT: The unique component of this gold panning kit is the paydirt! Engineered by professional Pacific Northwest prospector Bobby Bo, this paydirt is sourced from his gold rich claim site in Washington State; each bag will bare approximately 20 to 30 mesh gold flakes
  • ESSENTIAL GOLD PROSPECTING EQUIPMENT: x1 6 inch mini classifier screen to sift away gravel and other unwanted materials with 40 holes per square inch for fine material; 8 inch dual riffle high contrast color gold pan; the small classifier and gold pan are the perfect sizes for little hands
  • SNUFFER BOTTLE AND ACCESSORIES: x1 3oz snifter bottle to suck up and clean gold flakes, x1 glass vial to store found gold, x1 durable plastic scoop and x1 10X magnification glass loupe for material examination
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Materials: plastic, metal, glass, paydirt; Colors: green, black; Scoop length: 11”; Magnification loupe power: 10X; Glass vial capacity: 2 dram (.125oz), air tight plastic lid; Mini classifier screen size: 40 holes/inch (fine); Snifter bottle capacity: 3oz; Paydirt bag size: 3oz (.225lbs)

This ASR Outdoor 7pc gold panning kit is a great option for kids (and beginners) who are just getting started in the world of gold prospecting. With this kit, we’ve included 7 essential gold panning tools to learn and experiment with the basics of gold panning, however the unique component of this beginner gold panning kit is the paydirt, engineered by local professional Pacific Northwest prospector Bobby Bo; sourced from his gold rich claim site in Washington State, you'll be able to practice basic gold panning techniques without venturing far from home!

The essential gold prospecting equipment items included in this gold panning kit are the gold pan and mini classifier. For classifying, we’ve included a 6 inch mini classifier screen that will help to sift out larger unwanted materials from your black and blonde sands. The sifter features 40 holes per square inch, making it a great tool for sifting fine materials. For sifting out gold nuggets or gold flakes from your deposit, we’ve included an 8 inch dual riffle, high contrast gold pan that will allow you to pan off smaller gravels and sands and reach gold at the bottom.

As far as gold panning accessories are concerned, we’ve also included a 3oz snifter bottle that can be used to grab small gold nuggets. Once gold is captured, use the glass collection vial to safely store them. In addition to the snifter bottle and collection vial, we also included a 10X magnification power loupe for examining any findings.

And, as mentioned above, in collaboration with Bobby Bo, ASR Outdoor is proud to include our Pacific Northwest 3oz bag of gold paydirt concentrate and specifically designed for practicing gold panning techniques! Each bag will bare gold flakes and flower gold in the 20-30 mesh size range.

A great way to get outside and learn a new hobby while spending time with friends and family, pack this kids gold panning kit with paydirt on your next camping trip, or plan an outdoor excursion around gold prospecting at a nearby river or lake; either way, kids will love it!

Sourced from his gold rich claim site, you'll be able to learn gold panning techniques at home to pan for gold like a seasoned gold miner.

    The ASR Outdoor six piece gold panning kit is an excellent option for kids and beginners who are just getting started in gold prospecting. Inside the kit, we’ve included five essential prospecting equipment tools to learn the basics of gold panning. You'll find a modern 10" dual riffle gold pan that will help you start identifying and collecting precious ores. There is a 3oz gold snuffer bottle that can be used to grab small gold flakes at the bottom of your gold pan, fill it with water to suck up your small gold pickers and use the included glass collection vials to safely store them.

    We partnered with Bobby Bo to bring you this fun beginner gold pan gold panning kit for beginners so you can watch online videos and follow along at home before heading out into the field on your next camping trip. Bobby Bo gold paydirt is packed with size 20 and size 30 mesh coarse gold flake and fine gold flour with nearly no black sand or magnetite so you will not have to do any separation processing to find your gold in the paydirt. This bag of paydirt gold was expertly designed to practice gold prospecting techniques, not to make you rich. Bobby Bo is a gold prospecting expert who specializes in teaching classes of all ages about gold panning and gold mining.

    Grab this kit for yourself, a friend or family member who enjoys outdoor activities like camping and hiking. Its fun to find gold out it nature but learning how with the proper techniques is your first step in this fun outdoor hobby.

    • GOLD PAY DIRT - Each beginner gold pan kit comes with a 3 ounce bag of paydirt (total weight) each bag contains fine gold flour and coarse gold flakes in the 20-30 mesh size range
    • DUAL RIFFLE GOLD PAN - Best in class 10 inch gold pan has large and shallow riffle side wall, allowing better separation of gold from other material; lightweight, high contrast colors with carabiner hole
    • FINE GOLD RECOVERY TOOLS - (1) 3oz capacity gold snuffer bottle designed to suction pick up gold flakes and gold flour; (2) small glass vials with screw cap (1 dram and 1 2/3 dram capacity)
    • BEFORE USE - Gold pan should be seasoned before use by washing off all factory production oils
    • SPECIFICATIONS - Materials: plastic, metal, glass, paydirt; Colors: green, black, blue; Glass vial capacity: 1 dram (.065oz), 1 2/3 dram (.1oz) air tight plastic lid; Dual Riffle Gold Pan size: 10” diameter; Snifter bottle capacity: 3oz; Paydirt bag size: 3oz (.225lbs)

  • 32" FIXED PLASTIC SLUICE BOX: The Entire Sluice Box is 32 inches in Length with a 10-inch Wide Riffle Channel; 3-inch High Channel Walls; 16 inch Flared Opening Designed to Increase the Volume of Water Entering the Riffled Sediment Channel, While Increasing the Flow Rate though the Sluice Box
  • DURABLE CONSTRUCTION: Made to be used, designed to be portable! The sluice box for gold prospecting is lightweight made from high impact ABS plastic. It will never rust and can withstand the harshest environments


The ASR Outdoor Beginner Sluice Box Gold Prospecting Kit comes with everything you'll need to pan for gold anywhere, anytime!

The backbone of these kits are made up of the unique sluice boxes, both with a versatile shoulder strap which allows you to easily take it to the beach, mountains or a river.

The ASR Outdoor Gold Panning Gravity Trap 32-inch Portable Riffle Gold Sluice Box is a gravity fed high recovery gold prospecting and mineral collection tool. Extremely portable and weighing only 7lbs, made from high-impact durable plastic, it will never rust and can be used even in the harshest of climates without worry.

Molded into the channel of the sluice box is a set of riffle traps featuring four tested and true riffle designs to maximize the amount of gold that is separated from your pay dirt, they are; Hungarian, V-shape, Micro, and Square. These traditional and proven riffle patterns will help increase the amount of gold prospecting material you collect while separating your sediment and maximizing your efficiency.

The Gravity Trap Gold Sluice Box is 32 inches in length with a 10 inch wide channel and has 3 inch high channel walls to keep all your valuable, high yielding pay dirt confined and flowing over the riffle collection. The mouth of the Gold Prospecting Sluice Box features a 16 inch flared opening designed to increase the volume of water entering the prospecting channel thus increasing the flow rate through the Gold Prospecting Sluice Box. The Gold Prospecting Sluice Box is manufactured from green ABS High-Impact plastic allowing for maximum clarity and easy spotting or identifying of gold flakes, nuggets, gems, or your choice mineral.

Alternatively, the ASR Outdoor 50 Inch Folding Sluice Box is lightweight and incorporates traditional tried and true design aspects in an elongated 50" run out. with a large wide mouth flare opening. What makes this unit different and extra handy is the ability to fold up to just 15 inches tall by 12 inches wide, easily fitting into a backpack or 5 gallon bucket that is ideal for all day hikers, adventurers, and seasoned miner 49ers.  You can backpack this folding sluice into remote areas anywhere!

The sluice box body is designed to lock rigidly in place when the sluice is unfolded. This takes care of the most common complaint about similar cheaper models in that they would often fold up when you tried to pick them up out of the stream.

The sluice box riffles feature Uni-Body construction, the riffles are precision laser cut from a single piece of 18 gauge steel and then formed into ultra light, sturdy steel riffles. These are then zinc plated for long, rust-free service.

It even comes with miner's moss and carpet already installed, so you won't have to worry about cutting and fitting your own when starting out.

And lastly, In addition to the sluice box of your choice, we've included a 10" diameter gold pan with dual riffles, a 4oz capacity snifter bottle and a 2 dram glass vial for collecting your gems and minerals. We also added in a heavy duty trowel, a 10x magnifying loupe and a set of magnifying tweezers to help you identify and evaluate your findings. This is a great prospecting kit for beginners, intermediate and expert prospectors alike!

The ASR Outdoor Rock Pick Hammer is a 11 inch pointed tip prospecting equipment tool created especially with prospectors, rock hounds, contractors and the everyday user sin mind. This heavy, well-balanced, 20 ounce head weight rock hammer is fully polished and forged of one piece of steel. There are no frills or hidden agendas; it is made to take a beating and dish one out.

This is a rugged and extremely durable, field-tested geology fossil finding tool that features unibody one piece forged steel construction with a dual face hammer head; a square face on one end and a pointed tip rock pick on the other. The GR-20 has an overall weight of 32 ounces, and is 11.5 inches in length, the head weighs 20 ounces giving it great balance and superior power-to-weight ratio allowing you to strike with precision and drive chisels into rocks with confidence, splitting them apart while on the hunt for gold, minerals and fossils. The ergonomic anti-shock injection molded handle makes it comfortable to hold and gives relief while absorbing the vibrations from the constant striking of material.
